inscription_research.featured_projects:
Based on the search results from the NET Protocol website (), here are the featured inscribed drop projects and their basic info:

Featured Inscribed Drop Projects

Memecoin Ride
A project focused on tracking and engaging with viral memecoin trends. It utilizes the Net Protocol to store all metadata and minting configurations fully on-chain.
Approximate Price: 0.0005 ETH (Standard mint price)

Bazaar feed (hyperliquid)
A marketplace or data feed operating on the Hyperliquid network. It aggregates on-chain activity and listings for various inscribed assets.
Approximate Price: 0.0005 ETH (Standard mint price)

Seed memecoin (base)
A project dedicated to early-stage memecoin launches on the Base network. These drops are often "open editions," allowing for unlimited minting within a specific window.
Approximate Price: 0.0005 ETH (Standard mint price)

Bankr memecoin (base)
A project featuring memecoins on the Base network, including experimental tokens like "The Next Bankr Memecoin 1000x." It emphasizes decentralized, on-chain messaging and storage.
Approximate Price: 0.0005 ETH (Standard mint price)

Alpha (ALPHA)
A notable example of an "open edition" inscribed drop. It functions as a hybrid Memecoin-NFT where all data is permanently stored on the blockchain.
Approximate Price: 0.0005 ETH (Original mint price)

Recently Active Inscribed Collections
The platform also lists several recently active collections in its bazaar:

* KrakRocks (Onchain)ink: On-chain inscribed assets with listings/offers ranging from 0.0031 ETH to 0.01 ETH.
* Rekt Inkink: A theme-based collection of inscribed "ink" assets, with prices typically between 0.003 ETH and 0.01 ETH.
* TinyHyperCats (hyperliquid): Inscribed assets on the Hyperliquid network, often priced in HYPE or ETH.
* Dinosink: Dinosaur-themed inscribed assets with prices starting around 0.003 ETH.

Most "Inscribed Drops" on the platform are designed as low-cost, high-accessibility mints (often 0.0005 ETH) to encourage broad participation in the Net Protocol ecosystem.
